scripts.deploy:netlify: npm run build && npx --yes netlify-cli deploy --dir=dist
scripts.deploy:netlify:prod: npm run build && npx --yes netlify-cli deploy --prod --dir=dist
scripts.deploy:netlify:protected: npm run build:protected && npx --yes netlify-cli deploy --dir=dist
scripts.deploy:netlify:protected:prod: npm run build:protected && npx --yes netlify-cli deploy --prod --dir=dist
